biological_replicate: we carried out purifications from three S. cerevisiae strains
technical_replicate: Each sample was digested and run in technical duplicate.
experimental_design: yeast vs mammalian stress granule cores comparison
We have developed large-scale purifications of budding yeast and mammalian (HEK293T cell) stress granule cores
number_of_fractions: we employed sucrose density gradient centrifugation (SDGC)
